title: Dragonfruit [16x] - Red
description: A Red recolor of my Dragonfruit themed texture pack
body:
The Dragonfruit (Red) is a red recolor of the Dragonfruit.

It is a 1.8.9 texture pack made for pvp and based around the dragonfruit.

It uses the Bonsai by Hoodiepacks as a base and edits it to fit more the theme desired.

It is mainly made for bedwars but can also be used for other pvp gamemodes as well.

Here are some ingame screenshots to showcase more of the pack : 

![Dragonfruit Red prev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76dfa625269621c554caca0cc0422228d20f1374.jpeg)

![Dragonfruit Red prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe9dd077244f882c84adf6b2eda08febec996acc.jpeg)

![Dragonfruit Red prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72cf1304d4b391a8de009dcb578710e0f972bab5.jpeg)

It also exists in 2 variants :

- The Original pack :
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dragonfruit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dragonfruit)

![Dragonfruit Prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b88075d719f09fb62d189b2dfaf21413b6e97e6.jpeg)

- And The Yellow Recolor : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yellow-dragonfruit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yellow-dragonfruit)

![Dragonfruit Yellow prev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0edd286603b60a59bdd983853c9a6c2501f41b.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
